subject: [ConfigFetchFromCbs] Fix bug of cbs that fetch configs getting hung when policy engine is empty
commit_message:
[ConfigFetchFromCbs] Fix bug of cbs that fetch configs getting hung when
policy engine is empty

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3242
Signed-off-by: qingshuting <qingshuting1@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I21307291c182e3681ba864afc5a6a6f7eb5a8add
(cherry picked from commit 7d549f48c21ff063518e8ff481c3e5a9eb8ca8b0)

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Thinking fix not required to be cherrypicked as we are beyond Jakarta maintenace window - also this will cause version conflicts with master (2.1.8 exist in master and does not include this fix)

Alternatively if new container rls is not required from Jakarta, then just include java file and changelog (make entry under 2.1.7 itself) and revert back pom.xml/version properties.
